chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 27 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 04.03.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Dayo, Advocate for respondents No.5 to 8. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Case history shows that learned Counsel for the applicant has not taken any interest. This application is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
